tree.name: Kyle Anderson
tree.tradeDescription: Memphis traded Jaren Jackson Jr., John Konchar, Jock Landale, and Vince Williams Jr. to Utah for Kyle Anderson, Walter Clayton Jr., Taylor Hendricks, Georges Niang, 2027 1st (more favorable conditional), 2027 1st (LAL own), and 2031 1st (PHO own)
tree.note: UCLA forward, returning to Memphis after previous stint 2018-2022

assetsGivenUp.name: Jaren Jackson Jr.
assetsGivenUp.note: Michigan State forward, 2023 Defensive Player of the Year

assetsGivenUp.name: John Konchar
assetsGivenUp.note: Purdue Fort Wayne guard, signed as undrafted free agent to two-way contract

assetsGivenUp.name: Jock Landale
assetsGivenUp.note: Australian center, signed as free agent

assetsGivenUp.name: Vince Williams Jr.
assetsGivenUp.note: VCU guard, signed as undrafted free agent to two-way contract
